Statute.Title: Making Life More Affordable for Canadians Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: Loi visant à rendre la vie plus abordable pour les Canadiens

Regulations.Text: Note: 2026, c. 2, ss. 11 to 13 and 23 to 38: Regulations

ReviewReport.Text: Report to be tabled in each House of Parliament, 2026, c. 2, s. 2.1

CIF.Text: CIF, 2026, c. 2 in force on assent 12.03.2026, except,

Item.Text: — ss. 14, 15 and 17 deemed in force 01.04.2025 see s. 39
— ss. 16 and 18 deemed in force 01.10.2025 see s. 40
— s. 19 deemed in force 01.11.2025 see s. 41
— ss. 20 to 22 come into force 01.04.2035 see s. 42 — Not in force
— s. 47 deemed in force 31.05.2000 see s. 49
